---
title: "Chapter 12 Notes"
subtitle: "mutate() and case_when()"
author: "Tammy Lightle"
date: today
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: true
  message: true
editor: visual
---

# Quarto Notes

# Load Packages

```{r}
#| warning: false

library(dslabs)
library(dplyr)
```

# Vectorized Conditionals

## ifelse()

## case_when()

## More than two categories

### Nested ifelse()

### Multiple rule case_when()

# Mutate

## Column copy

### Mutate with arithmetic

### case_when() inside mutate()

## Overwrite Column Values
